message:
perf: Enable AVX-512 for native builds, disable for CI

- Native x86_64 builds: AVX-512 enabled (libdeflate uses runtime CPU detection)
- Generic/CI builds: AVX-512 disabled (avoids evex512 compile errors)
- ARM builds: Unaffected (uses NEON)

This gives maximum performance on machines with AVX-512 support while
keeping CI builds working on runners without AVX-512.
